wordplay_note: He is literally acting — undercover as himself
card_description: Bob Arctor (meaning "Arctor = actor; arc of descent") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *A Scanner Darkly*. Undercover narcotics agent who becomes addicted to Substance D while surveilling himself. Name note: He is literally acting — undercover as himself. The split self — surveillance destroys the distinction between observer and observed. First appears in *A Scanner Darkly*.

reference.brief: Undercover narcotics agent who becomes addicted to Substance D while surveilling himself
reference.significance: The split self — surveillance destroys the distinction between observer and observed
